title: encephalartos barteri subsp. allochrous
intro: Encephalartos barteri subsp. allochrous is a rare and endangered species of cycad, a type of ancient plant that belongs to the family Zamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Encephalartos barteri subsp. allochrous include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antidote for snake bites and scorpion stings. Traditionally, the plant's leaves are prepared by boiling or decocting them to make herbal teas or infusions, which are used for medicinal purposes.
